Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MARIO CASTRO AND ELEGANT CLEANERS "MOTION TO DISMISS BASED ON IMPROPER VENUE, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR AN ORDER FOR CHANGE OF VENUE PURSUANT TO CCP 395(a) FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT (WITH PLAINTIFFS TO PAY COSTS FOR CHANGE) - SOUTHWEST DISTRICT; REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS OF $3,341.25, OR MORE."
APPEARANCES: Douglas Holloway, Esq. of Law Office of Douglas Holloway 285-6226 for pltf & opposing party; James J. Regan, Esq. of Regan & Associates 310/372-1988 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENY VENUE, PROPER UNDER CCP SECTION 395a. ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. Order signed in open court. (302/PHA/VC) Judge: Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And That Requests For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Bank of the West's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories is moot as responses have been served. The motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted is denied as responses have been served. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $265 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
